(eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}]},"events":{"Approval(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when the allowance of a `spender` for an `owner` is set by a call to {approve}. `value` is the new allowance."},"Transfer(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when `value` tokens are moved from one account (`from`) to another (`to`). Note that `value` may be zero."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"allowance(address,address)":{"details":"Returns the remaining number of tokens that `spender` will be allowed to spend on behalf of `owner` through {transferFrom}. This is zero by default. This value changes when {approve} or {transferFrom} are called."},"approve(address,uint256)":{"details":"See {IERC20-approve}. NOTE: If `value` is the maximum `uint256`, the allowance is not updated on `transferFrom`. This is semantically equivalent to an infinite approval. Requirements: - `spender` cannot be the zero address."},"balanceOf(address)":{"details":"Returns the value of tokens owned by `account`."},"claimFreeTier()":{"details":"Claim free tier credits (once per user)"},"createPlan(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Create a new subscription plan (only owner)"},"decimals()":{"details":"Returns the number of decimals used to get its user representation. For example, if `decimals` equals `2`, a balance of `505` tokens should be displayed to a user as `5.05` (`505 / 10 ** 2`). Tokens usually opt for a value of 18, imitating the relationship between Ether and Wei. This is the default value returned by this function, unless it's overridden. NOTE: This information is only used for _display_ purposes: it in no way affects any of the arithmetic of the contract, including {IERC20-balanceOf} and {IERC20-transfer}."},"getActivePlans()":{"details":"Get all active plans"},"getPlan(uint256)":{"details":"Get plan details"},"getSessionCredits(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Get session credits for a user/agent","params":{"agentId":"The agent token ID","nftContract":"The NFT contract address","user":"The user address"}},"getUserCredits(address)":{"details":"Get user's credit balance"},"name()":{"details":"Returns the name of the token."},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"purchaseCredits(uint256)":{"details":"Purchase credits with ETH"},"purchasePlan(uint256)":{"details":"Purchase a credit plan (bulk purchase with discount)"},"purchaseSession(address,uint256)":{"details":"Purchase a session pack (50 credits) for an agent Forwards payment to RevenueShare contract","params":{"agentId":"The agent token ID","nftContract":"The NFT contract address"}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setAuthorizedSpender(address,bool)":{"details":"Authorize spender (backend service) (only owner)"},"setCreditPrice(uint256)":{"details":"Update credit price (only owner)"},"setFreeTierCredits(uint256)":{"details":"Update free tier credits (only owner)"},"setRevenueShareContract(address)":{"details":"Set RevenueShare contract address"},"spendCredits(address,uint256,string)":{"details":"Spend credits (only authorized spenders - backend service)"},"symbol()":{"details":"Returns the symbol of the token, usually a shorter version of the name."},"totalSupply()":{"details":"Returns the value of tokens in existence."},"transfer(address,uint256)":{"details":"See {IERC20-transfer}. Requirements: - `to` cannot be the zero address. - the caller must have a balance of at least `value`."},"transferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"See {IERC20-transferFrom}. Skips emitting an {Approval} event indicating an allowance update. This is not required by the ERC. See {xref-ERC20-_approve-address-address-uint256-bool-}[_approve]. NOTE: Does not update the allowance if the current allowance is the maximum `uint256`. Requirements: - `from` and `to` cannot be the zero address. - `from` must have a balance of at least `value`. - the caller must have allowance for ``from``'s tokens of at least `value`."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"updatePlanStatus(uint256,bool)":{"details":"Update plan status (only owner)"},"useSessionCredit(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Use a session credit (only authorized spenders - backend service)","params":{"agentId":"The agent token ID","nftContract":"The NFT contract address","user":"The user address"}},"withdraw()":{"details":"Withdraw accumulated ETH (only owner)"}},"title":"AgentCredits","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/AgentCredits.sol":"AgentCredits"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs","useLiteralContent":true},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n// OpenZeppelin Contracts (last updated v5.0.0) (access/Ownable.sol)\n\npragma solidity ^0.8.20;\n\nimport {Context} from \"../utils/Context.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @dev Contract module which provides a basic access control mechanism, where\n * there is an account (an owner) that can be granted exclusive access to\n * specific functions.\n *\n * The initial owner is set to the address provided by the deployer. This can\n * later be changed with {transferOwnership}.\n *\n * This module is used through inheritance. It will make available the modifier\n * `onlyOwner`, which can be applied to your functions to restrict their use to\n * the owner.\n */\nabstract contract Ownable is Context {\n    address private _owner;\n\n    /**\n     * @dev The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.\n     */\n    error OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address account);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)\n     */\n    error OwnableInvalidOwner(address owner);\n\n    event OwnershipTransferred(address indexed previousOwner, address indexed newOwner);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Initializes the contract setting the address provided by the deployer as the initial owner.\n     */\n    constructor(address initialOwner) {\n        if (initialOwner == address(0)) {\n            revert OwnableInvalidOwner(address(0));\n        }\n        _transferOwnership(initialOwner);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Throws if called by any account other than the owner.\n     */\n    modifier onlyOwner() {\n        _checkOwner();\n        _;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Returns the address of the current owner.\n     */\n    function owner() public view virtual returns (address) {\n        return _owner;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Throws if the sender is not the owner.\n     */\n    function _checkOwner() internal view virtual {\n        if (owner() != _msgSender()) {\n            revert OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(_msgSender());\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call\n     * `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner.\n     *\n     * NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner,\n     * thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.\n     */\n    function renounceOwnership() public virtual onlyOwner {\n        _transferOwnership(address(0));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`).\n     * Can only be called by the current owner.\n     */\n    function transferOwnership(address newOwner) public virtual onlyOwner {\n        if (newOwner == address(0)) {\n            revert OwnableInvalidOwner(address(0));\n        }\n        _transferOwnership(newOwner);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`).\n     * Internal function without access restriction.\n     */\n    function _transferOwnership(address newOwner) internal virtual {\n        address oldOwner = _owner;\n        _owner = newOwner;\n        emit OwnershipTransferred(oldOwner, newOwner);\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0xff6d0bb2e285473e5311d9d3caacb525ae3538a80758c10649a4d61029b017bb","license":"MIT"},"@openzeppelin/contracts/interfaces/draft-IERC6093.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n// OpenZeppelin Contracts (last updated v5.4.0) (interfaces/draft-IERC6093.sol)\npragma solidity >=0.8.4;\n\n/**\n * @dev Standard ERC-20 Errors\n * Interface of the https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-6093[ERC-6093] custom errors for ERC-20 tokens.\n */\ninterface IERC20Errors {\n    /**\n     * @dev Indicates an error related to the current `balance` of a `sender`. ^0.8.20;\n\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/ERC20.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title AgentCredits\n * @dev ERC20 token for AI Agent chat credits system\n */\ncontract AgentCredits is ERC20, Ownable, ReentrancyGuard {\n    uint256 public creditPrice = 0.0001 ether; // Price per credit\n    address public revenueShareContract;\n\n\n    // Credit purchase plans\n    struct CreditPlan {\n        uint256 credits;\n        uint256 price;\n        uint256 discountPercent;\n        bool active;\n    }\n\n    mapping(uint256 => CreditPlan) public plans;\n    uint256 public planCount;\n\n    // User => NFT Contract => Agent ID => Session Credits\n    mapping(address => mapping(address => mapping(uint256 => uint256))) public sessionCredits;\n\n    // Free tier\n    uint256 public freeTierCredits = 10;\n    mapping(address => bool) public hasClaimedFreeTier;\n\n    // Backend service address (authorized to spend credits)\n    mapping(address => bool) public authorizedSpenders;\n\n    // Events\n    event CreditsPurchased(address indexed buyer, uint256 amount, uint256 cost);\n    event CreditsSpent(address indexed user, uint256 amount, string reason);\n    event PlanPurchased(\n        address indexed buyer,\n        uint256 indexed planId,\n        uint256 credits,\n        uint256 cost\n    );\n    event FreeTierClaimed(address indexed user, uint256 amount);\n    event PlanCreated(\n        uint256 indexed planId,\n        uint256 credits,\n        uint256 price,\n        uint256 discountPercent\n    );\n    event PlanStatusUpdated(uint256 indexed planId, bool active);\n    event CreditPriceUpdated(uint256 newPrice);\n    event FreeTierCreditsUpdated(uint256 newAmount);\n    event AuthorizedSpenderUpdated(address indexed spender, bool authorized);\n\n    event SessionPurchased(address indexed user, address indexed nftContract, uint256 indexed agentId, uint256 amount, uint256 cost);\n    event SessionCreditUsed(address indexed user, address indexed nftContract, uint256 indexed agentId);\n\n    constructor() ERC20(\"Agent Credits\", \"ACRED\") Ownable(msg.sender) {\n        // Plan 0: 100 credits = 0.009 ETH (10% discount, normally 0.01 ETH)\n        _createPlan(100, 0.009 ether, 10);\n\n        // Plan 1: 500 credits = 0.04 ETH (20% discount, normally 0.05 ETH)\n        _createPlan(500, 0.04 ether, 20);\n\n        // Plan 2: 1000 credits = 0.07 ETH (30% discount, normally 0.1 ETH)\n        _createPlan(1000, 0.07 ether, 30);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Purchase credits with ETH\n     */\n    function purchaseCredits(uint256 amount) external payable nonReentrant {\n        require(amount > 0, \"Amount must be greater than 0\");\n\n        uint256 cost = amount * creditPrice;\n        require(msg.value >= cost, \"Insufficient payment\");\n\n        _mint(msg.sender, amount);\n\n        if (msg.value > cost) {\n            (bool refundSuccess, ) = payable(msg.sender).call{value: msg.value - cost}(\"\");\n            require(refundSuccess, \"Refund failed\");\n        }\n\n        emit CreditsPurchased(msg.sender, amount, cost);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Purchase a credit plan (bulk purchase with discount)\n     */\n    function purchasePlan(uint256 planId) external payable nonReentrant {\n        require(planId < planCount, \"Invalid plan ID\");\n\n        CreditPlan memory plan = plans[planId];\n        require(plan.active, \"Plan is not active\");\n        require(msg.value >= plan.price, \"Insufficient payment\");\n\n        _mint(msg.sender, plan.credits);\n\n        if (msg.value > plan.price) {\n            (bool refundSuccess, ) = payable(msg.sender).call{value: msg.value - plan.price}(\"\");\n            require(refundSuccess, \"Refund failed\");\n        }\n\n        emit PlanPurchased(msg.sender, planId, plan.credits, plan.price);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Claim free tier credits (once per user)\n     */\n    function claimFreeTier() external {\n        require(!hasClaimedFreeTier[msg.sender], \"Free tier already claimed\");\n\n        hasClaimedFreeTier[msg.sender] = true;\n        _mint(msg.sender, freeTierCredits);\n\n        emit FreeTierClaimed(msg.sender, freeTierCredits);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Spend credits (only authorized spenders - backend service)\n     */\n    function spendCredits(address user, uint256 amount, string calldata reason) external {\n        require(authorizedSpenders[msg.sender], \"Not authorized to spend credits\");\n        require(balanceOf(user) >= amount, \"Insufficient credits\");\n\n        _burn(user, amount);\n\n        emit CreditsSpent(user, amount, reason);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Get user's credit balance\n     */\n    function getUserCredits(address user) external view returns (uint256) {\n        return balanceOf(user);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Create a new subscription plan (only owner)\n     */\n    function createPlan(\n        uint256 credits,\n        uint256 price,\n        uint256 discountPercent\n    ) external onlyOwner {\n        _createPlan(credits, price, discountPercent);\n    }\n\n    function _createPlan(uint256 credits, uint256 price, uint256 discountPercent) private {\n        plans[planCount] = CreditPlan({\n            credits: credits,\n            price: price,\n            discountPercent: discountPercent,\n            active: true\n        });\n\n        emit PlanCreated(planCount, credits, price, discountPercent);\n        planCount++;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Update plan status (only owner)\n     */\n    function updatePlanStatus(uint256 planId, bool active) external onlyOwner {\n        require(planId < planCount, \"Invalid plan ID\");\n        plans[planId].active = active;\n        emit PlanStatusUpdated(planId, active);\n    }\n\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Purchase a session pack (50 credits) for an agent\n     * Forwards payment to RevenueShare contract\n     * @param nftContract The NFT contract address\n     * @param agentId The agent token ID\n     */\n    function purchaseSession(address nftContract, uint256 agentId) external payable nonReentrant {\n        require(nftContract != address(0), \"Invalid NFT contract\");\n        require(msg.value >= 0.005 ether, \"Insufficient payment (0.005 ETH required)\");\n        require(revenueShareContract != address(0), \"RevenueShare contract not set\");\n\n        // Grant 50 credits\n        sessionCredits[msg.sender][nftContract][agentId] += 50;\n\n        // Forward payment to RevenueShare\n        (bool success, ) = revenueShareContract.call{value: msg.value}(\n            abi.encodeWithSignature(\"recordRevenue(uint256,uint8)\", agentId, 0)\n        );\n        require(success, \"Revenue forwarding failed\");\n\n        emit SessionPurchased(msg.sender, nftContract, agentId, 50, msg.value);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Use a session credit (only authorized spenders - backend service)\n     * @param user The user address\n     * @param nftContract The NFT contract address\n     * @param agentId The agent token ID\n     */\n    function useSessionCredit(address user, address nftContract, uint256 agentId) external {\n        require(authorizedSpenders[msg.sender], \"Not authorized\");\n        require(sessionCredits[user][nftContract][agentId] > 0, \"Insufficient session credits\");\n\n        sessionCredits[user][nftContract][agentId] -= 1;\n        emit SessionCreditUsed(user, nftContract, agentId);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Get session credits for a user/agent\n     * @param user The user address\n     * @param nftContract The NFT contract address\n     * @param agentId The agent token ID\n     */\n    function getSessionCredits(address user, address nftContract, uint256 agentId) external view returns (uint256) {\n        return sessionCredits[user][nftContract][agentId];\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Set RevenueShare contract address\n     */\n    function setRevenueShareContract(address _revenueShareContract) external onlyOwner {\n        revenueShareContract = _revenueShareContract;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Update credit price (only owner)\n     */\n    function setCreditPrice(uint256 newPrice) external onlyOwner {\n        require(newPrice > 0, \"Price must be greater than 0\");\n        creditPrice = newPrice;\n        emit CreditPriceUpdated(newPrice);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Update free tier credits (only owner)\n     */\n    function setFreeTierCredits(uint256 amount) external onlyOwner {\n        freeTierCredits = amount;\n        emit FreeTierCreditsUpdated(amount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Authorize spender (backend service) (only owner)\n     */\n    function setAuthorizedSpender(address spender, bool authorized) external onlyOwner {\n        require(spender != address(0), \"Invalid spender address\");\n        authorizedSpenders[spender] = authorized;\n        emit AuthorizedSpenderUpdated(spender, authorized);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Get plan details\n     */\n    function getPlan(uint256 planId) external view returns (CreditPlan memory) {\n        require(planId < planCount, \"Invalid plan ID\");\n        return plans[planId];\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Get all active plans\n     */\n    function getActivePlans() external view returns (CreditPlan[] memory) {\n        uint256 activeCount = 0;\n\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < planCount; i++) {\n            if (plans[i].active) activeCount++;\n        }\n\n        CreditPlan[] memory activePlans = new CreditPlan[](activeCount);\n        uint256 index = 0;\n\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < planCount; i++) {\n            if (plans[i].active) {\n                activePlans[index] = plans[i];\n                index++;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return activePlans;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Withdraw accumulated ETH (only owner)\n     */\n    function withdraw() external onlyOwner nonReentrant {\n        uint256 balance = address(this).balance;\n        require(balance > 0, \"No funds to withdraw\");\n\n        (bool success, ) = payable(owner()).call{value: balance}(\"\");\n        require(success, \"Withdrawal failed\");\n    }\n\n    \n  \n}\n","keccak256":"0xffe8080671d86296c5e78179919191100a7e92d3c68e80dc13fb91b605740808","license":"MIT"}},"version":1}

devdoc.details: ERC20 token for AI Agent chat credits system

ERC20InsufficientAllowance(address,uint2.details: Indicates a failure with the `spender`’s `allowance`. Used in transfers.

params.allowance: Amount of tokens a `spender` is allowed to operate with.
params.needed: Minimum amount required to perform a transfer.
params.spender: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC20InsufficientBalance(address,uint256.details: Indicates an error related to the current `balance` of a `sender`. Used in transfers.

params.balance: Current balance for the interacting account.
params.needed: Minimum amount required to perform a transfer.
params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC20InvalidApprover(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `approver` of a token to be approved. Used in approvals.

ERC20InvalidReceiver(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `receiver`. Used in transfers.

params.receiver: Address to which tokens are being transferred.

ERC20InvalidSender(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `sender`. Used in transfers.

params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC20InvalidSpender(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `spender` to be approved. Used in approvals.

params.spender: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

Approval(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when the allowance of a `spender` for an `owner` is set by a call to {approve}. `value` is the new allowance.

Transfer(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when `value` tokens are moved from one account (`from`) to another (`to`). Note that `value` may be zero.

allowance(address,address).details: Returns the remaining number of tokens that `spender` will be allowed to spend on behalf of `owner` through {transferFrom}. This is zero by default. This value changes when {approve} or {transferFrom} are called.

approve(address,uint256).details: See {IERC20-approve}. NOTE: If `value` is the maximum `uint256`, the allowance is not updated on `transferFrom`. This is semantically equivalent to an infinite approval. Requirements: - `spender` cannot be the zero address.

balanceOf(address).details: Returns the value of tokens owned by `account`.

claimFreeTier().details: Claim free tier credits (once per user)

createPlan(uint256,uint256,uint256).details: Create a new subscription plan (only owner)

decimals().details: Returns the number of decimals used to get its user representation. For example, if `decimals` equals `2`, a balance of `505` tokens should be displayed to a user as `5.05` (`505 / 10 ** 2`). Tokens usually opt for a value of 18, imitating the relationship between Ether and Wei. This is the default value returned by this function, unless it's overridden. NOTE: This information is only used for _display_ purposes: it in no way affects any of the arithmetic of the contract, including {IERC20-balanceOf} and {IERC20-transfer}.

getSessionCredits(address,address,uint25.details: Get session credits for a user/agent

name().details: Returns the name of the token.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

purchasePlan(uint256).details: Purchase a credit plan (bulk purchase with discount)

purchaseSession(address,uint256).details: Purchase a session pack (50 credits) for an agent Forwards payment to RevenueShare contract

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

spendCredits(address,uint256,string).details: Spend credits (only authorized spenders - backend service)

symbol().details: Returns the symbol of the token, usually a shorter version of the name.

totalSupply().details: Returns the value of tokens in existence.

transfer(address,uint256).details: See {IERC20-transfer}. Requirements: - `to` cannot be the zero address. - the caller must have a balance of at least `value`.

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: See {IERC20-transferFrom}. Skips emitting an {Approval} event indicating an allowance update. This is not required by the ERC. See {xref-ERC20-_approve-address-address-uint256-bool-}[_approve]. NOTE: Does not update the allowance if the current allowance is the maximum `uint256`. Requirements: - `from` and `to` cannot be the zero address. - `from` must have a balance of at least `value`. - the caller must have allowance for ``from``'s tokens of at least `value`.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

useSessionCredit(address,address,uint256.details: Use a session credit (only authorized spenders - backend service)

devdoc.title: AgentCredits
